enable_cloud_save.description: Master switch for cloud save (Firestore sync).

enable_google_signin.description: Master switch for the Google Sign-in button.

enable_clans.description: Show the clans panel in the menu.

enable_matchmaking.description: Enable live multiplayer matchmaking (requires Cloud Functions).

daily_bonus_credits.description: Credits awarded for the daily bonus.

weekly_bonus_credits.description: Credits awarded for the weekly bonus.

battlepass_tier_size.description: XP required per battle pass tier.

battlepass_max_tier.description: Maximum battle pass tier for the current season.

ab_new_hud_layout.description: A/B test: percent of players in cohort B (new HUD layout).

ab_tactical_sprint.description: A/B test: percent of players in cohort B (tactical sprint).

ab_recoil_rework.description: A/B test: percent of players in cohort B (recoil rework).

maintenance_mode.description: When true, the game shows a maintenance screen.

maintenance_message.description: Message shown on the maintenance screen.

min_client_version.description: Minimum client version allowed to connect (semver).
